svg.title: AWS Blue/Green Deployment Architecture
svg.desc: Blue/green Kubernetes deployment pipeline on AWS using CodePipeline, ECR, and EKS

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the developer do in the AWS CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does CodeBuild do in Docker image building?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform create an EKS cluster on AWS?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS EKS handle Kubernetes workloads?')
sendPrompt('How does AWS Application Load Balancer route traffic in blue/green?')
sendPrompt('How do users access the deployed application through ALB?')
sendPrompt('What is the IAM role for EKS to pull from ECR?')
